Navigation

Site Map

Everything on ContentVerse — modules, pages, and functionality at a glance.

Complete architecture map — dotted lines show how navigation connects to modules, pages, sub-features, and admin tools. Every box is clickable where a live page exists.

NAV · Global header

ContentVerse NAV

Global header — logo, search, categories, finance ticker, notifications & profile

HomeBlogsReelsSportsFinanceCineVerseGoldVerseMoneyVerseJobs
Sign InWriteDashboard
Home

Landing page — discovery, trending content & live widgets

Page sections

  • Hero & featured stories

    Editor picks and latest published articles

  • Trending & popular

    Most-read blogs in the last 7 days

  • Category highlights

    Quick entry into 21+ topics

Live widgets

  • Market strip

    Nifty 50, Sensex & top gainers ticker

    • Live price refresh

      Yahoo Finance + NSE data

    • Tap to open Finance hub
  • Sports ticker

    Live cricket scores on homepage

  • Reels carousel

    Short-form preview cards

Engagement

  • Newsletter signup

    Weekly digest subscription

  • Reading streaks

    Track daily reading habit

  • Site stats

    Articles, creators & readers count

Platform flow · Verse hubs

  • CineVerse

    Movies, OTT & AI watchlist

    • TMDB movie search

      Find films by title

    • Personal watchlist

      Save films to watch later

    • AI picks

      Recommendations for you

  • GoldVerse

    Gold rates & hallmark tools

    • 316+ city gold rates

      Daily 22K / 24K prices

    • HUID verification

      Free BIS hallmark check

    • Hallmark buyer guide

      Spot fake gold tips

  • MoneyVerse

    UPI expense tracker India

    • Screenshot Scan (OCR)

      UPI image → auto-fill expense

    • Budget planner

      Per-category monthly limits

    • SIP & card reminders

      Never miss a due date

Reading

Discover, read and interact with long-form content

Browse

  • Explore all blogs

    Filter by latest, trending, editor picks

  • Categories

    Technology, AI, lifestyle, sports & more

  • Category page

    Subscribe to category updates

  • Bookmarks

    Saved articles across devices

  • Leaderboard

    Top creators & active readers

Article experience

  • Blog post page

    Full article with cover, author & related reads

    • Comments & replies

      Threaded discussion

    • Reactions

      Like, love, fire, clap, insightful

    • Tip

      Send ₹ tips to creator wallet

    • Bookmark & repost

      Save or share to profile

    • AI summary

      One-tap article summary

    • Reading history

      Track progress & time spent

    • Related recommendations

      Similar articles for you

  • Author profile

    Follow creators, view their posts

  • Polls & quizzes

    Interactive content on articles

Creators

Write, publish, monetize and grow your audience

Studio

  • Dashboard home

    Overview, streaks, quick actions

  • Write article

    Rich text editor with cover image

    • AI writing assist

      Draft, expand & SEO suggestions

    • SEO fields

      Meta title, description, slug

    • Blog scheduling

      Pick future date/time (IST) — auto-publishes via cron

    • Submit for review

      Goes to moderation queue

  • My blogs

    All · Published · Pending · Drafts · Rejected

    • Scheduled posts

      Upcoming auto-publish times in IST

    • Draft preview

      Author-only private preview before go-live

    • Edit live posts

      Save changes without unpublishing

  • Edit blog

    Update published or draft posts

  • Bookmarks

    Your saved reading list

Growth & money

  • Analytics

    Views, engagement & traffic sources

  • Earnings

    Tips received & wallet balance

  • Withdraw

    Request payout to bank/UPI

  • Achievements

    Badges for milestones

  • Referral program

    Invite friends, earn rewards

Programs

  • Creator Program

    Verification badge & featuring

    • Apply via email

      writewith@contentverses.in

    • 2 published posts required

      Quality review ~7 days

  • Premium

    Creator plan ₹199/mo · Reader ₹199/mo

    • Priority review

      Faster moderation queue

    • Enhanced analytics

      30-day deep stats

    • Paid posts

      Subscriber-only articles

Alerts

  • Notifications

    Likes, comments, follows, tips

  • Push notifications

    Browser & mobile alerts

  • Weekly digest email

    Personalized article picks

Reels

Short vertical video & image posts

Consumer

  • Reels feed

    Infinite scroll shorts

  • Reel detail

    Full-screen view with caption

  • Like & comment

    Engage with creators

  • View count

    Tracked per reel

Creator tools

  • My reels

    Manage all your shorts

  • Create reel

    Upload video or image

  • Edit reel

    Update caption & thumbnail

  • Moderation queue

    Pending approval before publish

Sports

Live

  • Sports home

    Live, upcoming & recent matches

  • Match centre

    Ball-by-ball scorecard

    • Live commentary

      Over-by-over updates

    • Scorecard

      Batting & bowling stats

    • Match reminders

      Push alert 30 min before start

Browse

  • Teams

    International & domestic squads

  • Team profile

    Squad, stats & fixtures

  • Players

    Search & trending players

  • Player profile

    Career stats & recent form

  • Series & tournaments

    Points table, schedule & squads

  • Cricket news

    Latest stories & match reports

Finance

Indian stock market — Nifty 50, watchlist & alerts

Markets

  • Finance hub

    Nifty 50, Sensex overview

  • Top gainers

    Best performers today

  • Top losers

    Biggest declines today

  • Top 10 stocks

    Most tracked symbols

  • Stock detail page

    Price, chart & company info

    • 3-month price chart

      Daily OHLC data

    • Day high / low / volume

      Live quote fields

Watchlist & alerts

  • Personal watchlist

    Add/remove NSE stocks

    • Market open email

      All watchlist stocks in one mail

    • Market close email

      Close price + % change

    • Top 5 gainers & losers

      Nifty 50 movers in same email

    • Push + in-app alerts

      Per-stock notifications

  • Stock search

    Find symbols by name

Discover

  • CineVerse hub

    Trending movies & streaming picks

  • Movie search

    TMDB-powered lookup

    • Search by title

      Find any film instantly

    • Movie detail page

      Cast, plot & ratings

  • Watchlist

    Save films — sign in to sync

  • AI picks

    Personalized recommendations

GoldVerse

Live gold rates, BIS HUID verification and hallmark buyer tools

Gold & hallmark

  • Gold rates

    316+ Indian cities — 22K & 24K

    • City search

      Find rate in your city

    • Daily refresh

      Updated market prices

  • HUID verification

    Verify BIS Hallmark Unique ID online

    • 5 free checks

      Per ContentVerse account

    • Official BIS database

      Purity & jeweller details

  • Hallmark guide

    Understand BIS marking

  • Fake gold checklist

    Buyer safety before you pay

MoneyVerse

Expense tracker, budgets, reminders & UPI screenshot OCR for India

Expense tracking

  • MoneyVerse hub

    Monthly expenses, budgets & reports

  • Screenshot Scan (OCR)

    Upload UPI payment screenshot — OCR auto-fills amount & merchant

    • PhonePe / GPay / Paytm

      Payment success screen images

    • Amount & merchant extract

      AI reads the image

    • Review & save

      Edit category before saving expense

  • Manual expense entry

    UPI, cash, card & categories

  • Monthly report

    Category-wise spending bars

Planning

  • Budget planner

    Per-category monthly limits

  • Payment reminders

    Credit card, SIP & custom due dates

Jobs

Government and private sector job listings for India

Listings

  • Jobs home

    All categories in one place

  • Government jobs

    Sarkari naukri, exams & results

  • Private jobs

    Tech, startup & corporate roles

Features

  • Filter by category

    Location, sector & type

  • External apply links

    Redirect to official portals

  • Daily sync

    Fresh listings via cron

Account

Authentication, profile & personal settings

Auth

  • Sign in

    Email + password or Google OAuth

  • Sign up

    Create free creator account

  • Sign out

    Clear session & cookies

Profile

  • Public profile

    Username, avatar, bio & posts

  • Follow creators

    Feed from people you follow

  • Settings

    Profile, notifications, theme

  • Reading challenges

    Daily goals & streaks

Admin Panel · Staff only

Admin PanelStaff only

Secure back-office for MODERATOR, ADMIN & SUPER_ADMIN roles — sidebar navigation, pending badges & platform controls

Access & layout

  • Role-gated entry

    Redirects to sign-in or dashboard if not admin

    • MODERATOR

      Content review access

    • ADMIN

      Full platform management

    • SUPER_ADMIN

      User promotion & password reset

  • Admin sidebar

    Sticky left nav with live pending badges

    • Approve blogs badge

      Count of PENDING submissions

    • Approve reels badge

      Count of pending shorts

    • Creator dashboard link

      Switch back to writer studio

  • Admin View banner

    Top strip when browsing site as admin

  • Admin View button

    Quick entry from main navbar or profile menu

Dashboard

  • Admin home

    Platform overview at a glance

    • Total users stat

      Registered accounts

    • Published blogs stat

      Live articles count

    • Pending review stat

      Awaiting moderation

    • Drafts stat

      Unpublished creator drafts

    • Pending moderation list

      Preview + quick open each blog

    • Quick links panel

      Shortcuts to every admin tool

  • Admin account

    Your staff profile & session info

Moderation

  • Approve blogs

    Review creator submissions before they go live

    • PENDING queue

      New posts waiting for human review

    • Approve & publish

      Sets status PUBLISHED + notifies author

    • Reject with reason

      Sends feedback to creator

    • Request edits

      Return to author for changes

  • Approve reels

    Review short video & image reels

    • Pending reels queue

      Badge count in sidebar

    • Approve / reject

      Controls public reels feed visibility

  • User reports

    Community-flagged content & abuse cases

    • Open reports list

      Submitted via report button

    • Resolve or dismiss

      Mark report handled

Content management

  • All blogs

    Search & filter entire content library

    • Filter by status

      Published · Pending · Scheduled · Draft · Rejected · Archived

    • Blog scheduling queue

      See posts set to auto-publish (IST times)

    • Search by title/author

      Find any post quickly

    • Archive / restore

      Hide without deleting

  • Blog editor (admin)

    Edit any article regardless of owner

    • Cover image & SEO fields

      Full editorial control

    • Schedule publish

      Set future go-live time in IST

    • Force publish

      Bypass creator submission flow

  • AI articles

    Gemini-powered SEO content generation

    • AI publishing pipeline

      Research → Writer → SEO → Image → Reviewer → Publisher

    • Hot topic picker

      Trending subjects by category

    • One-click generate

      Draft + cover via GEMINI_API_KEY

    • Daily cron articles

      Scheduled via /api/cron/daily-articles

  • Categories

    Manage topic taxonomy & metadata

    • Slug, name, description

      21+ editorial categories

    • Icons & banner images

      Category page branding

Social publishing

  • Meta publishing

    Cross-post blogs & reels to Facebook + Instagram

    • OAuth connect

      Facebook Login + Page token

    • Manual Page token

      META_PAGE_ID env fallback

    • Publish blog link

      Share article to connected Page

    • Publish reel

      Push short video to Instagram

    • Publish history log

      Permalinks & error tracking

Users & roles

  • All users

    Search profiles, emails & post counts

    • Filter by role

      USER · VERIFIED_CREATOR · MODERATOR · ADMIN

    • Sort by activity

      Recent signups & top creators

  • User detail

    Deep profile view per account

    • Blog breakdown

      Published / pending / draft / rejected

    • Follower & view stats

      Creator performance snapshot

    • Change password

      SUPER_ADMIN only

    • Promote to admin

      Elevate MODERATOR / ADMIN roles

Analytics & revenue

  • Analytics

    Platform-wide traffic & engagement

    • Page views trend

      Daily / weekly charts

    • Top articles

      Most read content

    • User growth

      Signups over time

  • Revenue

    Monetization dashboard

    • MRR & ARR

      Monthly / annual recurring revenue

    • Tips volume

      Creator tip transactions in ₹

    • Ad & premium breakdown

      Revenue by source chart

    • Payout controls

      Creator withdrawal settings

CMS & platform settings

  • Admin settings

    Site identity, homepage & push configuration

    • Branding assets

      Upload logo & favicon to S3

    • Firebase push setup

      VAPID key & credentials sync

    • Site title & tagline

      Global SEO defaults

    • Homepage sections toggle

      Hero, trending, newsletter, etc.

    • Trending logic

      Likes threshold & refresh interval

    • Announcement banner

      Site-wide alert message

  • Static pages CMS

    About, Premium, Terms, Privacy editable in DB

    • Premium pricing copy

      Creator ₹199/mo · Reader ₹199/mo

    • Legal pages

      Terms, privacy, cookies, policy

  • Cron & automation

    Background jobs admins rely on

    • Daily AI articles

      /api/cron/daily-articles

    • Blog scheduling publish

      /api/cron/publish-scheduled — every 10 min

    • Notification digests

      /api/cron/notifications

    • Stock & cricket alerts

      /api/cron/push-alerts

    • Sports data sync

      /api/cron/sports-sync
